chin_falam.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Dots khat, a kap lawng an let. Fact khat cawn, pahnih hngalh.
chin_falam.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Hi cu Tricky 15 facts pakhat a si — set tete recall taktak a herhmi. Practice → "Tricky 15" mode ah thleng in drill.
chin_falam.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Numbers khat, hmai pali. Fact khat na hngalh ahcun a dang kha a langhter.
chin_falam.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Highlight awk pattern thim. Table cu structure in a khat — na hmuh ahcun facts a cheu cu predictable an si.
chin_falam.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 A cunglei i pattern zeihmanh click in cells kha ceuter i rule kha rel. Patterns tampi an i tanhcuk khawh (tahchunhnak, 5×5 cu "5s multiple" le "perfect square" a si dih.).
chin_falam.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Zeicah patterns nih brute memorization an tei
chin_falam.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Table pathumnak khat tluk lawng memorize a herh.
chin_falam.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, 11s columns chungah a ummi paoh nih rule fawi a ngei. Squares cu set tete a si (12 facts). A tangmi cu "tricky middle" — facts 15 bantuk — recall taktak a herhmi: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 le an twins hna.
chin_falam.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: 7×8 na hngilh maw? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Fact a harmi kha a fawimi pahnih in ser. Rak tuah ṭhan tampi hnu ah, answer cu automatic a si.
chin_falam.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Fact pakhat cio kha area-model rectangle (Visual tab) asiloah pattern (hi tab) bantuk in visualize cu automatic recall a herh lomi answer lam a pek. Recall cu a hnu ah a ser, sihmanhsehlaw drilling lawng in a si lo.
chin_falam.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Cell pakhat cio = multiplication fact. Color = na mastery atu tiang. Cell zeihmanh click in cu fact kha drill.
chin_falam.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Fact family — numbers khat, hmai pali
chin_falam.next_question_coming: Biahalnak a rangmi a rat lai...
chin_falam.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Mastery threshold le selected factor caah sliders. Discrete 3-state outcome. Score a um lo, reveal a um lo.
chin_falam.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Hypothesis: A harnak a tongmi students caah threshold nih feedback zeitin dah a thleng?
chin_falam.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na dinh — prompts a onghmi langhter
chin_falam.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Mastery = 100% ahcun zeidah a si? Zeidah thangṭhat a hmuh?
chin_falam.how_does_color_coding_affect_motivatio: Color-coding nih motivation zeitin dah a nawlh?
chin_falam.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — namah bia in fianter
chin_falam.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Design note: discrete 3-state mastery marker; raw score a um lo; reveal a um lo — by design.
